races.name: Half-Troll
races.description: Born from unlikely unions, Half-Trolls are resilient warriors with regenerative blood and imposing tusks. While new to Faleria, they have spread rapidly, forming tight bonds of fellowship.

subraces.name: Ice Half-Troll
subraces.description: Impervious to cold with light blue or white skin, these descendants of the shipmaster Gaelea are masters of javelin fishing.

subraces.name: Sand Half-Troll
subraces.description: Impervious to heat, these red or orange-skinned trolls are descendants of the wormeater Fejuin, adapted to sandstorms.

subraces.name: Tropical Half-Troll
subraces.description: Impervious to moisture with blue or green skin, these descendants of Shima are explorers of the bug-filled Bysso Isles.

subraces.name: War Half-Troll
subraces.description: Always on the move with green or aqua skin, these lake troll descendants are the scouts of the warring Manyhal continent.

feat_halftroll_creature_type.name: Creature Type
feat_halftroll_creature_type.description:
• You are a Humanoid.
• You stand between 1.95 and 2.25 meters tall.
• You reach adulthood at age 15 and live up to 70 years.

feat_halftroll_ability_increase.name: Ability Score Increase
feat_halftroll_ability_increase.description: Increase one score by 2 and another by 1, or three different scores by 1. Your Constitution maximum is 22.

feat_halftroll_regeneration.name: Half-Troll Regeneration
feat_halftroll_regeneration.description:
• As a Bonus Action, you can expend one Hit Die to regain HP equal to your Level + Constitution modifier.
• If you took Fire or Acid damage, this is disabled until your next turn.
• You can use this to recuperate limbs or heal injuries instead of gaining HP. You cannot regenerate your head.

feat_halftroll_reicing.name: Re-icing
feat_halftroll_reicing.description: When using Regeneration, you may choose to heal one disease, Poisoned effect, or short-term curse instead of HP.

feat_halftroll_sandstrum.name: Sandstrum
feat_halftroll_sandstrum.description: You can see in lightly obscured areas within 9m as if they were not obscured, and in heavily obscured areas as if they were lightly obscured.

feat_halftroll_swamp_spirit.name: Swamp Spirit
feat_halftroll_swamp_spirit.description: You are unaffected by nonmagical difficult terrain.

feat_halftroll_unprovoked.name: Unprovoked
feat_halftroll_unprovoked.description: You have Advantage on Initiative rolls.
